scripts.build: npm run build -w @score/shared && npm run build -w @score/api && npm run build -w @score/worker && npm run build -w @score/www && npm run build -w @score/app
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @score/shared && npm run typecheck -w @score/api && npm run typecheck -w @score/worker && npm run typecheck -w @score/www && npm run typecheck -w @score/app
